name: skill performance run writes the report output to skills/PERF.md at the configured path
command: mkdir -p skills && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/perf.sh" --out skills/PERF.md --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && [ -f skills/PERF.md ] && grep -q 'generated_at: 2026-05-13' skills/PERF.md && echo ok 1>&2
